# artworkImage

**Instance Property**

Album artwork associated with the media object.

## Declaration

```swift
@NSCopying var artworkImage: NSImage? { get }
```

## Discussion

Applies to iTunes media only. Returns `nil` if not applicable or not available.

## Accessing Object Attributes

- **attributes**: A dictionary of attributes describing the media object.
- **mediaType**: The media object’s type of media (image, audio, or movie).
- **contentType**: The UTI associated with the media object.
- **name**: The name of the media object.
- **url**: The location of the media object.
- **originalURL**: The location of the original media object, if [doc://com.apple.medialibrary/documentation/MediaLibrary/MLMediaObject/url] is not the original location.
- **fileSize**: The size, in bytes, of the media object.
- **modificationDate**: The date and time when the media object was last altered.
- **thumbnailURL**: The location of the media object’s thumbnail image.
